issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, limiting its robustness.

scenarios.name: Install ExternalDNS on EKS with Route 53
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented Helm repo, the AWS provider values (provider.name=aws, --aws-zone-type, --txt-owner-id, --registry=txt, --policy=upsert-only) and IRSA service account annotation; baseline references generic kubectl/helm install but omits the txt-owner-id registry pattern and the IAM policy resource scoping.

scenarios.name: Auto-register DNS for a LoadBalancer Service on Cloudflare
scenarios.rationale: Treatment provides the exact external-dns.alpha.kubernetes.io/hostname and cloudflare-proxied annotations along with the CF_API_TOKEN secret wiring shown in the skill; baseline mentions annotations generically but misses the proxied flag and TXT-registry ownership pattern.
